station_address: Block G, BN Bhavan, Plot No C/50, G Block BKC, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400098
text:
Rude and Third Class Owner – Denied Washroom Access in Urgent Situation

My mom and aunt had been waiting on the road for 4–5 hours after the visa process and urgently needed a washroom. Since nothing nearby was open, we went to this petrol pump. The staff said the owner does not allow public use of the washroom.

I approached the owner, who had just come out of the washroom herself. She locked it and, despite our polite request, rudely refused. Her exact words were, “You came from the embassy, so go there only. You cannot use this washroom” She wouldn’t even listen to us and behaved in an extremely dismissive manner.

Denying basic facilities to women in an urgent situation is shameful and inhumane. This is unacceptable, and action should be taken against such behavior.
